sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Zan khuamialna ah i vakthap nawn kei ding,
A kilawm kong pi kihon ciang;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tua mun-ah Topa mu in i lung nuam ding,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Natna, satna dahnate om nawn lo ding,
A pai sa I lawm itte tawh kikhawl ding,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: khiat zawh loh lawpna kei aa hi ta ding,
Amah en in a sianthona ka mu

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Leitung vangik te’n hong nawngkai sak lo
Lungdam tawntungna ah Khris tawh i teng ding,
